title: noltea africana
intro: Noltea africana, also known as the Cape Beech, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the family Rutaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Noltea africana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
